prompt: A collage of vintage clocks overlapping with bright abstract shapes on a textured midnight blue background.
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork: A dynamic collage composition featuring assorted vintage clocks, varying in size and design, intricately layered and intertwined with vibrant, high-contrast abstract shapes. These shapes include crisp geometric forms and fluid organic contours. The entire complex arrangement is set against a deeply textured midnight blue background, resembling aged canvas or rough paper, providing rich visual depth as elements are distributed across the frame.
